ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection method */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag of the data */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)
